name: SeSa S.p.A.
summary: SeSa S.p.A., through its subsidiaries, distributes value-added information technology (IT) products and solutions in Italy. Its Software and System Integration sector offers software and IT products and services; ICT products and solutions, as well as system integration services; IT infrastructure and IoT solutions; artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions; digital and business application services; and HR management solutions, as well as operates solutions on the Microsoft Dynamics platform. It also provides cloud services; digital security services; digital manufacturing, processing, and transformation solutions; management, maintenance, technical assistance, and repair services for computers and IT products; and strategic outsourcing services, as well as operates in the cloud computing and systems assistance sectors. In addition, this sector develops and markets ERP software and applications; offers solutions and integrated services on the SAP Business One platform; develops 3cad products for the furniture industry; produces and markets software products, as well as provides IT services for the retail sector; offers project management services; and provides product lifecycle management solutions for manufacturing sector. The company's Business Services sector supplies business process outsourcing, digital transformation, and fleet management and operations services; and physical and logical security services for banks and operators in the retail sector. Its Value Added Distribution sector engages in the value added distribution of technological, enterprise software and datacenter solutions; management of networking solutions; providing design services for IT solutions; marketing Hitachi data systems solutions; and distribution of the Adobe brand. The company's Corporate sector offers logistics services; and marketing and promotion services for the ICT channel. SeSa S.p.A. is headquartered in Empoli, Italy. SeSa S.p.A. is a subsidiary of ITH S.p.A.
